title: Graduate Software Engineer (Python & Cloud)
description: Our 2-year rotational graduate scheme offers deep dives into backend engineering, cloud platforms, and DevOps. You will work primarily with Python, Docker, and AWS. We offer mentorship, competitive salary, and hybrid working.

title: Data Science & AI Intern
description: Looking for a summer intern to help our research team evaluate agentic LLM architectures. You will assist in cleaning data, running evaluations, and writing prompt workflows. Strong Python and pandas skills are essential.

title: Associate Product Manager - Graduate Program
description: Join our fast-paced product team helping to shape the future of fintech. As an APM, you will run customer interviews, define product specs, and collaborate with engineering. No deep coding required, but a strong technical mindset is a must.
